steps.title: Read the table values
steps.content: The table gives $365$ employees for warehouse stores and $130$ employees for supermarkets.

steps.title: Find how much greater
steps.content: Because the question asks how much greater, subtract: $$365-130=235.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Warehouse stores averaged $235$ more employees than supermarkets. This matches the correct answer, C.
